fields.explainZh: 操作系统分配给Eden区JVM的使用空间。
fields.explainEn: Eden space allocated by the operating system to JVM.

fields.explainZh: Eden区JVM的初始使用空间。
fields.explainEn: Initial space usage of JVM's Eden space.

fields.explainZh: Eden区JVM的最大使用空间。
fields.explainEn: Maximum space usage of JVM's Eden space.

fields.explainZh: 操作系统分配给Eden区JVM的内存。
fields.explainEn: Memory allocated to JVM's Eden space by the operating system.

fields.explainZh: Eden区JVM的已使用空间。
fields.explainEn: Eden space used by JVM.

fields.explainZh: Eden区JVM的初始内存。
fields.explainEn: Initial memory space allocated to JVM's Eden space.

fields.explainZh: Eden区JVM的最大内存。
fields.explainEn: Maximum memory space allocated to JVM's Eden space.

fields.explainZh: 操作系统分配给Eden区JVM的峰内存。
fields.explainEn: Peak memory space allocated to JVM's Eden space by the operating system.

fields.explainZh: Eden区JVM的初始峰内存。
fields.explainEn: Initial peak memory of JVM's Eden space.

fields.explainZh: Eden区JVM的最大峰内存。
fields.explainEn: Maximum peak memory of JVM's Eden space.

fields.explainZh: Eden区JVM的已使用峰内存。
fields.explainEn: Used peak memory of JVM's Eden space.

fields.explainZh: Eden区JVM的已使用内存。
fields.explainEn: Used memory of JVM's Eden space.

fields.explainZh: Hbase应用的主机名称。
fields.explainEn: Host name of the Hbase application.

fields.explainZh: 垃圾回收的总次数。
fields.explainEn: Total number of garbage collection operations.

fields.explainZh: 新生代的垃圾回收次数。
fields.explainEn: Number of garbage collections for the young generation.

fields.explainZh: 老年代的垃圾回收次数。
fields.explainEn: Number of garbage collections for the old generation.

fields.explainZh: 垃圾回收耗费的总时间。
fields.explainEn: Total time spent on garbage collection.

fields.explainZh: 新生代的垃圾回收耗费的时间。
fields.explainEn: Time spent on garbage collection for the young generation.

fields.nameEn: GC Time Millis Concurrent Mark Sweep
fields.explainZh: 老年代垃圾回收耗费的时间。
fields.explainEn: Time spent on garbage collection for the old generation.

fields.explainZh: 正在阻塞等待监视器锁的线程数目。
fields.explainEn: Number of threads currently blocked and waiting for a monitor lock.

fields.explainZh: 正在执行状态的线程数目。
fields.explainEn: Number of threads currently in the executing state.

fields.explainZh: 已退出线程数目。
fields.explainEn: Number of threads that have exited.

fields.explainZh: 等待另一个线程执行取决于指定等待时间的操作的线程数目。
fields.explainEn: The number of threads that are waiting for another thread to perform an action for up to a specified waiting time.

fields.explainZh: 无限期地等待另一个线程来执行某一特定操作的线程数目。
fields.explainEn: Number of threads waiting indefinitely for another thread to execute a specific operation.

fields.explainZh: 操作系统分配给JVM的堆内存。
fields.explainEn: Heap memory allocated by the operating system to JVM.

fields.explainZh: JVM初始的堆内存。
fields.explainEn: Initial heap memory size of JVM.

fields.explainZh: JVM堆内存的最大值。
fields.explainEn: Maximum heap memory size of JVM.

fields.explainZh: 操作系统分配给JVM的非堆内存。
fields.explainEn: Non-heap memory allocated by the operating system to JVM.

fields.explainZh: JVM初始的非堆内存。
fields.explainEn: Initial non-heap memory size of JVM.

fields.explainZh: JVM非堆内存的最大值（如果为-1，表示没有限制最大的非堆内存）。
fields.explainEn: Maximum non-heap memory size of JVM. A value of -1 indicates no maximum limit for non-heap memory.

fields.explainZh: JVM已经使用的非堆内存。
fields.explainEn: Non-heap memory used by JVM.

fields.explainZh: JVM已经使用的堆内存。
fields.explainEn: Heap memory used by JVM.

fields.nameZh: 老年代使用空间已提交

fields.nameEn: Init Collection Usage of Old Gen

fields.explainEn: Maximum space of JVM's old generation space.

fields.nameEn: Used Collection Usage of Old Gen

fields.explainEn: Used space of JVM's old generation space.

fields.explainZh: 老年代区JVM的初始内存。
fields.explainEn: Initial memory size of JVM's old generation space.

fields.explainZh: 老年代区JVM的最大内存。
fields.explainEn: Maximum memory size of JVM's old generation space.

fields.explainEn: Peak memory allocated by the operating system to JVM's old generation space.

fields.nameEn: Init Peak Usage of Old Gen
fields.explainZh: 老年代区JVM的初始峰内存。
fields.explainEn: Initial peak memory of JVM's old generation space.

fields.nameEn: Max Peak Usage of Old Gen
fields.explainZh: 老年代区JVM的最大峰内存。
fields.explainEn: Maximum peak memory of JVM's old generation space.

fields.nameEn: Used Peak Usage of Old Gen

fields.explainEn: Used peak memory of JVM's old generation space.

fields.explainEn: Used memory of JVM's old generation space.

fields.explainZh: 操作系统当前可用的处理器个数。
fields.explainEn: Number of processors currently available in the operating system.

fields.explainZh: CPU的平均能承载能力。
fields.explainEn: Average capability of the CPU.

fields.explainZh: 操作系统分配给JVM的虚拟内存。
fields.explainEn: Virtual memory allocated by the operating system to JVM.

fields.explainZh: 操作系统的空闲物理内存大小。
fields.explainEn: Idle physical memory size of the operating system.

fields.explainZh: 操作系统的空闲交换空间大小。
fields.explainEn: Idle swap space size of the operating system.

fields.explainZh: 文件总数量。
fields.explainEn: Total number of files.

fields.explainZh: 打开的文件数量。
fields.explainEn: Number of opened files.

fields.explainZh: CPU正在处理的进程数。
fields.explainEn: Number of processes currently being processed by the CPU.

fields.explainZh: CPU的最大能承载能力。
fields.explainEn: Maximum capability of the CPU.

fields.explainZh: 操作系统的总物理内存大小。
fields.explainEn: Total physical memory size of the operating system.

fields.explainZh: 操作系统占用的总交换空间大小。
fields.explainEn: Total swap space size occupied by the operating system.

fields.explainZh: U-CENTER连接到Hbase应用并返回响应的时间。
fields.explainEn: Time period between U-CENTER connection setup to the Hbase application and response.

fields.explainEn: Initial memory space of JVM's Survivor space.

fields.explainEn: Initial peak memory of JVM's Survivor space.

fields.explainEn: Maximum peak memory of JVM's Survivor space.

fields.explainEn: Used peak memory of JVM's Survivor space.
